timing_basis: self-reported post-hoc rationale per code-reviewer MINOR-2 (future live measurements will overwrite via append-only JSONL discipline)
bug_summary: Text glow BLImage composite at canvas right edge clips pixels past fb.width when text positioned near edge with large glow radius (composite_bl_image at offset raster.x_offset - padding exceeds fb.width)
fix_summary: Pre-clip bbox WARN log when composite offset extends past framebuffer bounds; safe-clamp x,y to canvas inside. Avoids hard clipping while surfacing the diagnosis for future maintainers.

phrase_rule: FAIL if new_tickets>=10 AND adapters>=4 AND verified!=yes
